creator: torfinn.ingolfsen@broadpark.no
text:
On Sun, 12 Dec 2010 06:07:07 +0100 (CET)
dinoex@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: port graphics/tiff: tiff2pdf tints images with wrong colors when converting (any tiff version newer than 3.8.0)
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: analyzed->feedback
> State-Changed-By: dinoex
> State-Changed-When: Sun Dec 12 06:06:28 CET 2010
> State-Changed-Why: 
> 
> 
> http://bugzilla.maptools.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2150
> 
> 
> Lee Howard <faxguy@howardsilvan.com> changed:
> 
>            What    |Removed                     |Added
> ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
>              Status|NEW                         |RESOLVED
>                  CC|                            |faxguy@howardsilvan.com
>          Resolution|                            |WORKSFORME
> 
> 
> 
> 
> --- Comment #1 from Lee Howard <faxguy@howardsilvan.com>  2010-12-11 21:00:01 ---
> Please try 3.9.4 or 4.0.0beta.  tiff2pdf works for me.  If you still have
> problems please reopen and attach a TIFF.
> 
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=110826

The problem still exists, with FreeBSD 8.1-stable, tiff-4.0.0 and xpdf-3.02_14.
tingo@kg-v2$ uname -a
FreeBSD kg-v2.kg4.no 8.1-STABLE FreeBSD 8.1-STABLE #3: Thu Sep 16 22:18:48 CEST 2010     root@kg-v2.kg4.no:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

The page at http://sites.google.com/site/tingox/libtiff_freebsd
is updated.

I'll try to update the upstream PR.

-- 
Regards,
Torfinn Ingolfsen
